+@MainActor
+private final class AppControllerCleanupModelManager: CleanupModelManaging {
+    var phase: CleanupModelManager.Phase = .idle
+    var errorMessage: String?
+    var downloadProgress: Double?
+    var loadedModelID: String?
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String> = []
+    var suspendLoad = false
+    var loadError: Error?
+    private(set) var refreshCachedModelIDsCallCount = 0
+    private(set) var loadCallIDs: [String] = []
+
+    private var loadContinuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Never>?
+
+    func load(modelID: String?) async {
+        let resolvedModelID = CleanupModelDescriptor.catalogEntry(id: modelID ?? "")?.id ?? CleanupModelDescriptor.default.id
+        loadCallIDs.append(resolvedModelID)
+        errorMessage = nil
+        phase = .downloading
+        downloadProgress = 0.25
+
+        if suspendLoad {
+            await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
+                loadContinuation = continuation
+            }
+        }
+
+        if let loadError {
+            downloadProgress = nil
+            phase = .error
+            errorMessage = loadError.localizedDescription
+            return
+        }
+
+        downloadProgress = nil
+        phase = .loading
+        await Task.yield()
+        loadedModelID = resolvedModelID
+        cachedModelIDs.insert(resolvedModelID)
+        phase = .ready
+    }
+
+    func refreshCachedModelIDs() async {
+        refreshCachedModelIDsCallCount += 1
+    }
+
+    func shutdown() async {
+    }
+
+    func resumeLoad() {
+        suspendLoad = false
+        loadContinuation?.resume()
+        loadContinuation = nil
+    }
+}
+
 private final class AppControllerSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {

@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@
+import Foundation
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class CleanupModelLoaderTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testIsCachedChecksCanonicalApplicationSupportPath() async throws {
+        let fileManager = FileManager.default
+        let rootURL = try makeTemporaryDirectory()
+        let cacheURL = rootURL.appending(path: "Qwen3.5-2B-Q4_K_M.gguf", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        try Data("model".utf8).write(to: cacheURL)
+
+        let loader = CleanupModelLoader(
+            runtime: FakeCleanupRuntime(),
+            fileManager: fileManager,
+            cleanupModelsRootURL: rootURL
+        )
+
+        let cached = try await loader.isCached(.qwenTwoB)
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(cached)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testDownloadMovesTheModelIntoTheCanonicalCachePath() async throws {
+        let fileManager = FileManager.default
+        let rootURL = try makeTemporaryDirectory()
+        let downloadedURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "downloads", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "Qwen3.5-4B-Q4_K_M.gguf", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(
+            at: downloadedURL.deletingLastPathComponent(),
+            withIntermediateDirectories: true
+        )
+        try Data("model".utf8).write(to: downloadedURL)
+
+        let runtime = FakeCleanupRuntime()
+        runtime.downloadedURL = downloadedURL
+        let loader = CleanupModelLoader(
+            runtime: runtime,
+            fileManager: fileManager,
+            cleanupModelsRootURL: rootURL
+        )
+
+        let reportedProgress = CleanupProgressRecorder()
+        try await loader.download(.qwenFourB) { progress in
+            reportedProgress.record(progress)
+        }
+
+        let expectedURL = rootURL.appending(path: "Qwen3.5-4B-Q4_K_M.gguf", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.downloadedModelIDs, [CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id])
+        XCTAssertEqual(reportedProgress.snapshot(), [0.4, 1.0])
+        XCTAssertTrue(fileManager.fileExists(atPath: expectedURL.path))
+        XCTAssertFalse(fileManager.fileExists(atPath: downloadedURL.path))
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testLoadInitializesTheRuntimeWithTheCanonicalModelFileAndRequiredDefaults() async throws {
+        let fileManager = FileManager.default
+        let rootURL = try makeTemporaryDirectory()
+        let cacheURL = rootURL.appending(path: "Qwen3.5-0.8B-Q4_K_M.gguf", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        try Data("model".utf8).write(to: cacheURL)
+
+        let runtime = FakeCleanupRuntime()
+        let loader = CleanupModelLoader(
+            runtime: runtime,
+            fileManager: fileManager,
+            cleanupModelsRootURL: rootURL
+        )
+
+        try await loader.load(.qwenZeroPointEightB)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.initializationRequests, [
+            CleanupInitializationRequest(
+                modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id,
+                modelURL: cacheURL,
+                maxTokenCount: 2048,
+                temperature: 0.1,
+                systemPrompt: SettingsStore.defaultCleanupPrompt,
+                thinkingMode: .suppressed
+            )
+        ])
+    }
+
+    private func makeTemporaryDirectory() throws -> URL {
+        let url = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory
+            .appending(path: UUID().uuidString, directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: url, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: url)
+        }
+        return url
+    }
+}
+
+@MainActor
+private final class FakeCleanupRuntime: CleanupRuntimeLoading {
+    var downloadedURL: URL?
+    var downloadedModelIDs: [String] = []
+    var initializationRequests: [CleanupInitializationRequest] = []
+    private(set) var resetCallCount = 0
+
+    func download(
+        _ model: CleanupModelDescriptor,
+        to directory: URL,
+        progress: @escaping @MainActor @Sendable (Double) -> Void
+    ) async throws -> URL {
+        downloadedModelIDs.append(model.id)
+        progress(0.4)
+        progress(1.0)
+        return downloadedURL ?? directory
+    }
+
+    func initialize(_ request: CleanupInitializationRequest) async throws {
+        initializationRequests.append(request)
+    }
+
+    func reset() {
+        resetCallCount += 1
+    }
+}
+
+private final class CleanupProgressRecorder: @unchecked Sendable {
+    private let lock = NSLock()
+    private var values: [Double] = []
+
+    func record(_ value: Double) {
+        lock.lock()
+        values.append(value)
+        lock.unlock()
+    }
+
+    func snapshot() -> [Double] {
+        lock.lock()
+        let snapshot = values
+        lock.unlock()
+        return snapshot
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,292 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class CleanupModelManagerTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testCatalogExposesThreeDocumentedCleanupModels() {
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog.map(\.id),
+            [
+                "qwen35_0_8b_q4_k_m",
+                "qwen35_2b_q4_k_m",
+                "qwen35_4b_q4_k_m"
+            ]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(CleanupModelDescriptor.default.id, "qwen35_0_8b_q4_k_m")
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog.map(\.speedLabel),
+            ["Very fast", "Fast", "Full"]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testUnknownModelFallsBackToTheDefaultCleanupModel() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id]
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: "missing-model")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.loadedModelID, CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            loader.calls,
+            [
+                "isCached:qwen35_0_8b_q4_k_m",
+                "load:qwen35_0_8b_q4_k_m"
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testUncachedModelTransitionsThroughDownloadingAndLoadingBeforeReady() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.suspendDownload = true
+        loader.suspendLoad = true
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        let task = Task {
+            await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id)
+        }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .downloading)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.downloadProgress, 0.25)
+
+        loader.resumeDownload()
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .loading)
+        XCTAssertNil(manager.downloadProgress)
+
+        loader.resumeLoad()
+        await task.value
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.loadedModelID, CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            loader.calls,
+            [
+                "isCached:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m",
+                "download:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m",
+                "load:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m"
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testCachedModelLoadsWithoutDownloading() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id]
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            loader.calls,
+            [
+                "isCached:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m",
+                "load:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m"
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testSwitchingModelsResetsLoadedRuntimeBeforeLoadingNewModel() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id,
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id
+        ]
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id)
+        loader.calls.removeAll()
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.resetCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            loader.calls,
+            [
+                "isCached:qwen35_4b_q4_k_m",
+                "load:qwen35_4b_q4_k_m"
+            ]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.loadedModelID, CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testConcurrentLoadWaitsForInFlightRequestAndAvoidsDuplicateWorkForSameModel() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id]
+        loader.suspendLoad = true
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        let firstTask = Task {
+            await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id)
+        }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        let secondTask = Task {
+            await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenTwoB.id)
+        }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .loading)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, ["isCached:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m", "load:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m"])
+
+        loader.resumeLoad()
+        await firstTask.value
+        await secondTask.value
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, ["isCached:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m", "load:qwen35_2b_q4_k_m"])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testRefreshCachedModelIDsReportsAllCachedEntries() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id,
+            CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id
+        ]
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.refreshCachedModelIDs()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            manager.cachedModelIDs,
+            [
+                CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id,
+                CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testDownloadFailureTransitionsToErrorWithTheRuntimeMessage() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        loader.downloadErrorSequence = [
+            NSError(domain: "CleanupModelManagerTests", code: 1, userInfo: [
+                NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Disk full."
+            ])
+        ]
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenFourB.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .error)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.errorMessage, "Disk full.")
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testAvailabilityOverrideFalseTransitionsToErrorWithoutStartingLoad() async {
+        let loader = TestCleanupModelLoader()
+        let manager = CleanupModelManager(
+            catalog: CleanupModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            availabilityOverrideProvider: { false }
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: CleanupModelDescriptor.qwenZeroPointEightB.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .error)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.errorMessage, "Cleanup model unavailable.")
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, [])
+    }
+}
+
+private final class TestCleanupModelLoader: CleanupModelLoading {
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String> = []
+    var calls: [String] = []
+    var lastInitializationRequest: CleanupInitializationRequest?
+    var suspendDownload = false
+    var suspendLoad = false
+    var resetCallCount = 0
+    var downloadErrorSequence: [Error] = []
+    var loadErrorSequence: [Error] = []
+
+    private var downloadContinuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Never>?
+    private var loadContinuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Never>?
+
+    func isCached(_ model: CleanupModelDescriptor) async throws -> Bool {
+        calls.append("isCached:\(model.id)")
+        return cachedModelIDs.contains(model.id)
+    }
+
+    func download(_ model: CleanupModelDescriptor, progress: @escaping @MainActor @Sendable (Double) -> Void) async throws {
+        calls.append("download:\(model.id)")
+        if !downloadErrorSequence.isEmpty {
+            throw downloadErrorSequence.removeFirst()
+        }
+        progress(0.25)
+
+        if suspendDownload {
+            await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
+                downloadContinuation = continuation
+            }
+        }
+
+        progress(1.0)
+        cachedModelIDs.insert(model.id)
+    }
+
+    func load(_ model: CleanupModelDescriptor) async throws {
+        calls.append("load:\(model.id)")
+        lastInitializationRequest = CleanupInitializationRequest(
+            modelID: model.id,
+            modelURL: URL(fileURLWithPath: "/tmp/\(model.id).gguf"),
+            maxTokenCount: model.maxTokenCount,
+            temperature: 0.1,
+            systemPrompt: SettingsStore.defaultCleanupPrompt,
+            thinkingMode: .suppressed
+        )
+        if !loadErrorSequence.isEmpty {
+            throw loadErrorSequence.removeFirst()
+        }
+
+        if suspendLoad {
+            await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
+                loadContinuation = continuation
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    func resetLoadedModels() async {
+        resetCallCount += 1
+    }
+
+    func resumeDownload() {
+        suspendDownload = false
+        downloadContinuation?.resume()
+        downloadContinuation = nil
+    }
+
+    func resumeLoad() {
+        suspendLoad = false
+        loadContinuation?.resume()
+        loadContinuation = nil
+    }
+}

@@ -50,3 +50,13 @@
 - Hardened the model manager state machine with configured-model resolution, timeout retry handling, cached-model inventory reporting, model-load attempt logging, and a reset seam for future diarization support when switching models.
 - Added application-level speech-model recovery so a failed model bootstrap can transition from Error back to Ready after a later successful load, while keeping the hotkey monitor and status lifecycle aligned with the documented contract.
 **Summary:** Delivered the full speech-model-management layer behind Ghost Pepper’s dictation loop. The app now supports the three documented Whisper models plus the FluidAudio Parakeet backend, keeps Whisper caches under Application Support while leaving FluidAudio in its framework-managed cache, retries timed-out speech downloads and loads once after 500 ms, exposes cached-model inventory for future UI surfaces, and recovers from model-load errors back to Ready after a successful reload. During wrap-up, STORY-0660, STORY-0661, and STORY-0662 moved to ITER-0007 because they depend on the real Settings shell and Models section host surface rather than the backend model subsystem itself.
+
+## ITER-0005
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-10
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0506, STORY-0528, STORY-0543, STORY-0550, STORY-0555, STORY-0605, STORY-0606, STORY-0704, STORY-0705, STORY-0706, STORY-0707, STORY-0708, STORY-0709, STORY-0710, STORY-0711, STORY-0712, STORY-0713, STORY-0714, STORY-0715, STORY-0716, STORY-0718, STORY-0719, STORY-0720, STORY-0721, STORY-0723, STORY-0724, STORY-0725, STORY-0726, STORY-0727, STORY-0730, STORY-0731, STORY-0732, STORY-0733, STORY-0959, STORY-0960, STORY-0961, STORY-0962, STORY-0963, STORY-0964, STORY-0966, STORY-0967, STORY-0968
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Added the cleanup-model catalog, cache-path handling, HuggingFace download/move flow, lifecycle state machine, availability override, and runtime initialization bridge for the three documented Qwen GGUF variants.
+- Integrated cleanup-model startup management into `AppController`, including background cache refresh/load, persisted cleanup selection handling, successful speech-model preference persistence, and menu-bar progress/error exposure without blocking Ready.
+- Extended controller, settings, loader, and manager coverage for cleanup-model switching, concurrent loads, startup progress visibility, and invalid-preference fallback while keeping FluidAudio cache placement framework-managed.
+**Summary:** Delivered the cleanup-model-management backend and menu feedback layer. Ghost Pepper now persists cleanup-model choices, boots the selected cleanup model in the background, reports cleanup download progress in the menu, keeps cleanup GGUF files under Application Support, and preserves the documented speech and cleanup model catalogs and cache contracts. During wrap-up, STORY-0717 and STORY-0722 moved to ITER-0016 because their unresolved acceptance criteria depend on the later Sortformer/speaker-filtering runtime, STORY-0728 and STORY-0729 moved to ITER-0009 because their remaining acceptance criteria are cleanup-inference behavior, and STORY-0958 moved to ITER-0007 because the Runtime models card host surface does not exist until the settings-shell iteration.
